auth.label: API Key
auth.description: OpenWeather API key sent as the appid query parameter. Find or create it on the API keys page in your OpenWeather account: https://openweathermap.org/faq.

actions.name: add_weather_station
actions.description: Create one OpenWeather weather station under the current account.

latitude.description: The station latitude in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The station longitude in decimal degrees.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a weather station.

latitude.description: The station latitude in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The station longitude in decimal degrees.

created_at.description: The station creation time in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The station update time in ISO 8601 format.

user_id.description: The owner identifier when returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: A weather station object returned by OpenWeather.

actions.name: delete_weather_station
actions.description: Delete one OpenWeather weather station by identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting a weather station.

message.description: The confirmation message returned by the connector.

outputSchema.description: The weather-station deletion result.

actions.name: get_5_day_forecast
actions.description: Retrieve the OpenWeather 5-day forecast in 3-hour steps for exactly one location selector.

q.description: The city name, optionally followed by state code and country code, such as London,GB.

zip.description: The ZIP or postal code followed by country code, such as 94040,US.

mode.description: The upstream response mode. Only json is supported.

units.description: The units of measurement for the response.

lang.description: The response language code in ISO 639-1 format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for 5-day, 3-hour forecast data.

anyOf.description: The internal response code as text.
The internal response code as a number.

message.description: The internal message value returned by OpenWeather.

cnt.description: The number of forecast entries returned.

dt.description: The forecast time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

items.description: A weather condition entry returned by OpenWeather.

1h.description: The precipitation volume for the last hour.

3h.description: The precipitation volume for the last three hours.

1h.description: The precipitation volume for the last hour.

3h.description: The precipitation volume for the last three hours.

pod.description: The part-of-day flag returned by the forecast endpoint.

dt_txt.description: The forecast time in UTC text format.

items.description: A 3-hour forecast entry returned by OpenWeather.

timezone.description: The shift in seconds from UTC.

sunrise.description: The sunrise time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

sunset.description: The sunset time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

city.description: The city metadata for the forecast.

outputSchema.description: The 5-day weather forecast payload returned by OpenWeather.

actions.name: get_air_pollution_current
actions.description: Retrieve the current air-pollution snapshot for one latitude and longitude.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for air-pollution data.

coord.description: The coordinates for the requested place.

aqi.description: The OpenWeather Air Quality Index from 1 to 5.

co.description: The carbon monoxide concentration in ug/m3.

no.description: The nitric oxide concentration in ug/m3.

no2.description: The nitrogen dioxide concentration in ug/m3.

so2.description: The sulphur dioxide concentration in ug/m3.

dt.description: The calculation time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

items.description: A current, forecast, or historical air-pollution data point.

list.description: The ordered air-pollution data points returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: The air-pollution payload returned by OpenWeather.

actions.name: get_air_pollution_forecast
actions.description: Retrieve the air-pollution forecast for one latitude and longitude.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for air-pollution data.

coord.description: The coordinates for the requested place.

aqi.description: The OpenWeather Air Quality Index from 1 to 5.

co.description: The carbon monoxide concentration in ug/m3.

no.description: The nitric oxide concentration in ug/m3.

no2.description: The nitrogen dioxide concentration in ug/m3.

so2.description: The sulphur dioxide concentration in ug/m3.

dt.description: The calculation time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

items.description: A current, forecast, or historical air-pollution data point.

list.description: The ordered air-pollution data points returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: The air-pollution payload returned by OpenWeather.

actions.name: get_air_pollution_history
actions.description: Retrieve historical air-pollution data for one latitude and longitude over a time range.

start.description: The start time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

end.description: The end time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for historical air-pollution data.

coord.description: The coordinates for the requested place.

aqi.description: The OpenWeather Air Quality Index from 1 to 5.

co.description: The carbon monoxide concentration in ug/m3.

no.description: The nitric oxide concentration in ug/m3.

no2.description: The nitrogen dioxide concentration in ug/m3.

so2.description: The sulphur dioxide concentration in ug/m3.

dt.description: The calculation time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

items.description: A current, forecast, or historical air-pollution data point.

list.description: The ordered air-pollution data points returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: The air-pollution payload returned by OpenWeather.

actions.name: get_circle_city_weather
actions.description: Retrieve current weather for nearby cities around one latitude and longitude by using OpenWeather's compatibility city-search endpoint.

lat.description: The latitude of the circle centre in decimal degrees.

lon.description: The longitude of the circle centre in decimal degrees.

cnt.description: The maximum number of nearby cities to return.

mode.description: The upstream response mode. Only json is supported.

units.description: The units of measurement for the response.

lang.description: The response language code in ISO 639-1 format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for nearby-city weather data.

anyOf.description: The internal response code as text.
The internal response code as a number.

message.description: The internal message value returned by OpenWeather.

count.description: The number of city entries returned.

dt.description: The calculation time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

sunrise.description: The sunrise time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

sunset.description: The sunset time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

timezone.description: The shift in seconds from UTC.

items.description: A weather condition entry returned by OpenWeather.

weather.description: The weather conditions for the city.

1h.description: The precipitation volume for the last hour.

3h.description: The precipitation volume for the last three hours.

1h.description: The precipitation volume for the last hour.

3h.description: The precipitation volume for the last three hours.

items.description: A current weather entry returned by the circle city weather endpoint.

list.description: The current weather entries for nearby cities.

outputSchema.description: The current weather payload for nearby cities returned by OpenWeather.

actions.name: get_current_weather
actions.description: Retrieve the current weather for exactly one OpenWeather location selector.

q.description: The city name, optionally followed by state code and country code, such as London,GB.

zip.description: The ZIP or postal code followed by country code, such as 94040,US.

units.description: The units of measurement for the response.

lang.description: The response language code in ISO 639-1 format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for current weather data.

coord.description: The coordinates for the requested place.

items.description: A weather condition entry returned by OpenWeather.

weather.description: The weather conditions for the requested place.

base.description: The internal base parameter returned by OpenWeather.

1h.description: The precipitation volume for the last hour.

3h.description: The precipitation volume for the last three hours.

1h.description: The precipitation volume for the last hour.

3h.description: The precipitation volume for the last three hours.

dt.description: The calculation time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

sunrise.description: The sunrise time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

sunset.description: The sunset time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

timezone.description: The shift in seconds from UTC.

name.description: The place name returned by OpenWeather.

cod.description: The internal response code returned on success.

outputSchema.description: The current weather payload returned by OpenWeather.

actions.name: get_geocoding_by_zip
actions.description: Resolve one ZIP or postal code into a named OpenWeather location.

zip.description: The ZIP or postal code followed by country code, such as 94040,US.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for ZIP or postal-code geocoding.

local_names.description: Localized names keyed by language code.

state.description: The state or region name when available.

zip.description: The ZIP or postal code when available.

location.description: The ZIP or postal-code geocoding result.

outputSchema.description: The ZIP or postal-code geocoding result.

actions.name: get_geocoding_direct
actions.description: Resolve one place name into one or more OpenWeather geocoding matches.

limit.description: The maximum number of place matches to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for direct geocoding.

local_names.description: Localized names keyed by language code.

state.description: The state or region name when available.

zip.description: The ZIP or postal code when available.

items.description: A place result returned by the OpenWeather Geocoding API.

locations.description: The geocoding matches returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: The direct geocoding results.

actions.name: get_geocoding_reverse
actions.description: Resolve one latitude and longitude pair into one or more named places.

limit.description: The maximum number of place matches to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reverse geocoding.

local_names.description: Localized names keyed by language code.

state.description: The state or region name when available.

zip.description: The ZIP or postal code when available.

items.description: A place result returned by the OpenWeather Geocoding API.

locations.description: The reverse-geocoding matches returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: The reverse geocoding results.

actions.name: get_station_measurements
actions.description: List aggregated historical measurements for one OpenWeather weather station.

type.description: The aggregation granularity: minute, hour, or day.

limit.description: The maximum number of aggregated records.

from.description: The interval start as a Unix UTC timestamp.

to.description: The interval end as a Unix UTC timestamp.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing aggregated station measurements.

date.description: The aggregated measurement time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

type.description: The aggregation granularity returned by OpenWeather.

items.description: An aggregated weather-station measurement record returned by OpenWeather.

measurements.description: The aggregated station measurements returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: The weather-station measurement list.

actions.name: get_uv_index
actions.description: Return the current UV index by sampling OpenWeather One Call 3.0, because the legacy UV Index API is retired.

units.description: The units of measurement for the response.

lang.description: The response language code in ISO 639-1 format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the current UV index compatibility helper.

lat.description: The latitude used for the UV lookup.

lon.description: The longitude used for the UV lookup.

dateIso.description: The sampled timestamp encoded in ISO 8601 format.

value.description: The UV index value sampled from One Call 3.0.

outputSchema.description: A UV index point synthesized from OpenWeather One Call 3.0.

actions.name: get_uv_index_forecast
actions.description: Return daily UV forecast points by sampling OpenWeather One Call 3.0, because the legacy UV Index API is retired.

cnt.description: The maximum number of daily UV forecast points to return.

units.description: The units of measurement for the response.

lang.description: The response language code in ISO 639-1 format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the UV forecast compatibility helper.

lat.description: The latitude used for the UV lookup.

lon.description: The longitude used for the UV lookup.

dateIso.description: The sampled timestamp encoded in ISO 8601 format.

value.description: The UV index value sampled from One Call 3.0.

items.description: A UV index point synthesized from OpenWeather One Call 3.0.

list.description: The ordered daily UV forecast points synthesized from One Call 3.0.

outputSchema.description: The UV forecast compatibility results.

actions.name: get_uv_index_history
actions.description: Return sampled historical UV index points by querying OpenWeather One Call 3.0 timemachine once per day in the requested range, because the legacy UV Index API is retired.

start.description: The start time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

end.description: The end time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

units.description: The units of measurement for the response.

lang.description: The response language code in ISO 639-1 format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the UV history compatibility helper.

lat.description: The latitude used for the UV lookup.

lon.description: The longitude used for the UV lookup.

dateIso.description: The sampled timestamp encoded in ISO 8601 format.

value.description: The UV index value sampled from One Call 3.0.

items.description: A UV index point synthesized from OpenWeather One Call 3.0.

list.description: The sampled historical UV index points synthesized from One Call 3.0.

outputSchema.description: The UV history compatibility results.

actions.name: get_weather_map_tile
actions.description: Fetch one OpenWeather weather-map tile and return it as Base64 PNG bytes.

palette.description: The custom palette string sent to the upstream tile API.

opacity.description: The tile opacity sent to the upstream tile API.

fill_bound.description: Whether to request upstream fill outside the data boundary.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching a weather map tile.

tileBase64.description: The requested weather tile encoded as Base64 PNG bytes.

contentType.description: The content type returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: The weather map tile payload returned by OpenWeather.

actions.name: get_weather_station
actions.description: Retrieve one OpenWeather weather station by identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for selecting a weather station.

latitude.description: The station latitude in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The station longitude in decimal degrees.

created_at.description: The station creation time in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The station update time in ISO 8601 format.

user_id.description: The owner identifier when returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: A weather station object returned by OpenWeather.

actions.name: get_weather_triggers
actions.description: Compatibility action for the retired OpenWeather Weather Triggers API. Execution always returns a deprecation error.

type.description: The trigger type, such as temperature or wind.

condition.description: The comparison operator used by the trigger.

anyOf.description: A single threshold value for the trigger.

items.description: A numeric bound.

anyOf.description: The lower and upper threshold bounds for the trigger.

value.description: The numeric threshold or threshold range for the trigger.

lat.description: The trigger latitude in decimal degrees.

lon.description: The trigger longitude in decimal degrees.

location.description: The location monitored by the trigger.

items.description: A weather-trigger definition kept for compatibility.

triggers.description: The trigger definitions requested for compatibility.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the retired weather-trigger compatibility action.

items.description: One weather-trigger compatibility result.

triggers.description: The trigger results returned by the compatibility action.

outputSchema.description: The weather-trigger compatibility result.

actions.name: list_weather_stations
actions.description: List all OpenWeather weather stations available to the current account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing weather stations.

latitude.description: The station latitude in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The station longitude in decimal degrees.

created_at.description: The station creation time in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The station update time in ISO 8601 format.

user_id.description: The owner identifier when returned by OpenWeather.

items.description: A weather station object returned by OpenWeather.

stations.description: The weather stations returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: The weather-station list.

actions.name: submit_station_measurements
actions.description: Submit one or more measurements for existing OpenWeather weather stations.

dt.description: The measurement time as a Unix UTC timestamp.

wind_speed.description: The wind speed in metres per second.

wind_gust.description: The wind gust speed in metres per second.

rain_1h.description: The rainfall for the previous hour in millimetres.

rain_6h.description: The rainfall for the previous six hours in millimetres.

rain_24h.description: The rainfall for the previous twenty-four hours in millimetres.

snow_1h.description: The snowfall for the previous hour in millimetres.

snow_6h.description: The snowfall for the previous six hours in millimetres.

snow_24h.description: The snowfall for the previous twenty-four hours in millimetres.

items.description: One cloud-layer measurement object.
One observed weather phenomenon object.
One weather-station measurement submitted to OpenWeather.

measurements.description: The list of weather-station measurements to submit.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for submitting station measurements.

message.description: The confirmation message returned by the connector.

outputSchema.description: The station-measurement submission result.

actions.name: update_weather_station
actions.description: Update one existing OpenWeather weather station.

latitude.description: The updated station latitude in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The updated station longitude in decimal degrees.

altitude.description: The updated station altitude in metres.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a weather station.

latitude.description: The station latitude in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: The station longitude in decimal degrees.

created_at.description: The station creation time in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The station update time in ISO 8601 format.

user_id.description: The owner identifier when returned by OpenWeather.

outputSchema.description: A weather station object returned by OpenWeather.
